race.comment: CHICO CASINO (3) raced handy but couldn't quicken well enough over 1000m and finish a distant third at Orange last start. Good wet tracker who is more at home over today's trip. Very fit and ready to win again. GLOWING RAPIDS (1) has been in work for ages but continues to perform well. Led and tried very hard but found a couple better late in the piece last time out over 1300m at Dubbo. Should bowl along here and give them something to catch. HAMMERING AWAY (2) has been easily accounted for at all four runs this prep but they have been in far tougher races than this. An improving track helps and he is a threat in this company. GETTIN' TIPSY (10) has been struggling on dry tracks but now gets conditions to suit. Very fit after three runs back and is a definite contender. FANTASY CROWNED (8) wasn't bad through the line first-up at Mudgee and the extra 100m today is a help.
